name: Risotto w/ Smoked Chichen, 0ven Dried Tomatoes, Brie, Aspar
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch fresh asparagus, tips only, blanched
Salt and freshly ground pepper – to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chicken stock and water in a large saucepan. Bring to a boil over high heat; reduce heat and keep warm.
2. Heat the olive oil in a nonreactive medium saucepan. Add the rice. Cook over medium heat for 1 minute, stirring until coated.
3. Stir in the white wine. Cook until absorbed.
4. Gradually add the warmed chicken broth mixture (1 cup at a time), ensuring all liquid is absorbed before adding more.
5. Cook over medium heat for 18 minutes or until the rice is tender but firm, stirring constantly.
6. Add the smoked chicken, oven-dried tomatoes, pine nuts, Brie cheese, asparagus tips, basil, salt, and pepper; mix well. Serve immediately.
